chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. S- 166 of 2018 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.01.2018 For orders on MA 459/18 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 460/17 For katcha peshi Mr. Sajid Ali Soomro, advocate for petitioner Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mehar, State Counsel Learned counsel for petitioners states that he will be satisfied if learned Asst. A.G. gives undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and shall provide legal protection to the petitioners. Learned State Counsel present in court in other matters waives notice and gives such undertaking that the official respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and shall act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioners as is provided to the other citizens of this country. Learned counsel for petitioners being satisfied with the undertaking does not press this petition any further which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
